list1.text: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Vue/React + PHP/Laravel) with 15+ years building web applications, data solutions, and automation. Strong database background (SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL).

list1.title: ETL / Data Warehousing (multi-source consolidation, CSV exports)

list2.title: Vue 2/3 + Quasar (component libraries, interactive UI, migrations)
HTML / CSS (CSS frameworks: Tailwind, Bootstrap; Quasar UI/components; responsive UI, design systems)
PHP + Laravel (APIs, background jobs, Blade templates/components, Eloquent ORM, integrations)
Google Apps Script (workflow automation for Docs/Sheets/Slides)

section3.text1: Microsoft Certified Professional - Querying Microsoft SQL Server 2012.

list1: Highlights:
Build SCORM-compliant web-based learning modules and interactive e-learning experiences using Vue 2/3, React, Quasar, HTML/CSS, and JavaScript.
Build and maintain reusable Vue/Quasar boilerplates and a component library (LMS integration, data persistence, animation utilities, global helpers, and common interactions).
Led a multi-phase frontend modernization: Vue 2 (non-SFC) → Vue 2 SFC + Vue CLI → Vue 3 + Quasar CLI, improving maintainability, consistency, and team delivery speed.

Build PHP/Laravel APIs and backend data services (MySQL) to provide an additional data layer for web-based trainings beyond the LMS/SCORM data, including multi-source consolidation and ETL-style workflows (databases + legacy CSVs) with automated exports (CSV via FTP/SFTP) and Tableau dashboards.
Created automation tooling, including a Node.js/TypeScript code generator that parses Google Docs storyboards (metadata-driven) to generate Vue course code based on a component schema/library.
Develop and maintain the company website (tuesdayafternoon.net) using React, GSAP, and Matter.js for interactive animation.
Partner on Storyline builds and add custom JavaScript when projects require functionality beyond standard Storyline features.

Own infrastructure and operations for production/web environments, including hosting setup, DNS management, certificates, server administration, cron job automation, hosting-provider migrations, and Google Workspace administration.

list1.title2: Destination CEO (Capstone Project at Humber), Toronto, ON
list1: Built 'With Gratitude,' an online auction platform: designed the MySQL database (Oracle Data Modeler) and contributed to PHP/Laravel development; showcased at the Humber ICT Capstone EXPO (Apr 2019).
Web developer in the Internet division supporting intranet apps and public websites (portal + Internet Banking).
Database/data analyst work with MIS: ETL processes, database development, and warehouse/reporting.

list1.title2: Project IT - IT Consultancy, Sao Paulo, Brazil
list1: Developed and maintained the Sales management and inventory control application for a publishing company (Cia das Letras), using SQL (T-SQL), DTS/SSIS, and Visual Basic.
Developed and maintained the Goodyear landscaping tire Inspection Report and Dashboard, using SQL (T-SQL), DTS/SSIS, and Visual FoxPro.

list1.title2: Brasilassist - Call Center Company, Sao Paulo, Brazil
list1: Developed and maintained the Call Center Application using SQL (T-SQL) and Visual Fox Pro.
Developed and maintained FINASA bank's first Home Banking Application using Visual Basic.

list1.title1: PUC - Pontificia Universidade Catolica University, Sao Paulo, Brazil
See What they are Saying - AI (ChatGPT)
list1: This is a website that shows the summary of product reviews and Twitter threads.

All the content is generated through PHP jobs, which scrape data from large sales sites and Twitter threads. After gathering the data the PHP jobs use ChatGPT API to summarize the data and provide insights in the form of 'Pros and Cons'.
Unfortunately, Twitter has discontinued their free APIs that allowed scraping of its data, so the project got canceled.
Technology:
PHP
HTML/Bootstrap CSS
ChatGPT API
This is the Vue.js/Quasar project for this resume page.
Technology:
Vue.js
Quasar
I18n for Internationalization / Multilanguage
Hands-on PHP project: a job listing website built from scratch in vanilla PHP (no frameworks), using a lightweight Laravel-like architecture.
Covers PHP fundamentals (variables/data types, arrays/loops, control structures, functions/scope, OOP, superglobals) plus database integration with PDO.
Highlights:
Custom router supporting HTTP methods, route parameters, and middleware
App/Framework separation with reusable core classes (Router, Database, Validation, Session)
Job listings CRUD with authentication/authorization and protected routes
Search/filter by keywords and location
Validation/sanitization and PDO prepared statements (SQL injection protection)
Technology:
PHP (vanilla)
MySQL
PDO
HTML/CSS
Real-world job listing application built with Laravel (MVC, routing, middleware)
Highlights:
Job listings CRUD with authentication and authorization policies
User dashboard with bookmarking and online application flow (resume upload)
Profile avatar upload and user profiles
Search, filtering, and pagination

Mailers and database seeding
